title: tephrosia decora
intro: Tephrosia decora, also known as Ornamental Horsefly Tree, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Tephrosia decora include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its use should be done under the guidance of a medical professional.
